name: Mosaic Hallucination
description: Design de novo binders using gradient-based optimization directly on the Boltz-2 loss landscape. Optimizes a PSSM against binding metrics (IPTM, PAE, Contacts) and inverse folding recovery. Winner of the in silico portion of the Adaptyv Nipah binding competition. Skips traditional separate inverse folding/filtering steps for an end-to-end design approach.
capabilities: Design de novo binders using gradient-based optimization directly on the Boltz-2 loss landscape
Optimizes a PSSM against binding metrics (IPTM, PAE, Contacts) and inverse folding recovery
Winner of the in silico portion of the Adaptyv Nipah binding competition
Skips traditional separate inverse folding/filtering steps for an end-to-end design approach

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed binder

hotspots.description: Target residues for binder to interact with

numDesigns.description: Number of binder designs to generate
